nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 帕拉州
nodes.summary: 帕拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联57种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、Red-throated piping guan、Buff-browed chachalaca等57种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Golden-crowned manakin
nodes.summary: Golden-crowned manakin（Golden-crowned manakin，学名 Lepidothrix vilasboasi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于帕拉州、塔帕若斯河，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 塔帕若斯河
nodes.summary: 塔帕若斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联40种鸟类，包括细嘴隐蜂鸟、塔帕諾斯隱蜂鳥、Amazonian trogon等40种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The golden-crowned manakin has a small range in Brazil's southwestern Pará along the upper Cururu and Jamanxim rivers; both are tributaries of the Tapajós River

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The golden-crowned manakin has a small range in Brazil's southwestern Pará along the upper Cururu and Jamanxim rivers; both are tributaries of the Tapajós River

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The species is threatened by ongoing deforestation

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Though it "[a]ppears to tolerate significant forest perturbation, including selective logging...Fieldwork [is] urgently required with the aim of determining the species’ current status and distribution, and the extent of habitat destruction and further threats at known sites"
